description: Letter from Shela bar Mevasser to 'The Rabbi' Yehuda ha-Kohen b. Yosef, Rosh ha-Seder ('Head of the Row'). The letter was written before Shela's appointment as a judge. The letter starts with four lines of Hebrew Poetry. (Information from Frenkel. For additional information see Med. Soc. 3:431). On verso there are also the opening lines from a legal document, probably a draft. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
